content:
Stripe 𝗛𝗶𝗿𝗶𝗻𝗴 — 𝗦𝗼𝗳𝘁𝘄𝗮𝗿𝗲 𝗘𝗻𝗴𝗶𝗻𝗲𝗲𝗿 𝗜𝗻𝘁𝗲𝗿𝗻
𝗘𝘅𝗽𝗲𝗿𝗶𝗲𝗻𝗰𝗲: Students & Freshers

𝗘𝘅𝗽𝗲𝗰𝘁𝗲𝗱 𝗦𝘁𝗶𝗽𝗲𝗻𝗱: ₹80K – ₹1.5L/Month (Approx.)
𝗣𝗣𝗢: High-performing interns may be considered for full-time opportunities.

𝗘𝗹𝗶𝗴𝗶𝗯𝗶𝗹𝗶𝘁𝘆:
• Pursuing or completed Bachelor's, Master's, or PhD in Computer Science, Mathematics, or a related field

𝗦𝗸𝗶𝗹𝗹𝘀:
• Java / Ruby / JavaScript / Scala / Go
• Data Structures & Algorithms
• Computer Science Fundamentals
• Problem Solving

𝗗𝗶𝗿𝗲𝗰𝘁 𝗔𝗽𝗽𝗹𝘆 𝗟𝗶𝗻𝗸: https://pdlink.in/4fdKhcd https://lnkd.in/g7K95mgf

If you have strong fundamentals and good projects, don't hesitate to apply.
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
𝗧𝗼𝗽 𝟱 𝗦𝗸𝗶𝗹𝗹𝘀 𝗧𝗼 𝗠𝗮𝘀𝘁𝗲𝗿 𝗜𝗻 𝟮𝟬𝟮𝟲 — 𝗘𝗻𝗿𝗼𝗹𝗹 𝗙𝗼𝗿 𝗙𝗥𝗘𝗘

Build future-ready skills with these free learning programs:

𝗔𝗜 & 𝗠𝗟 : https://pdlink.in/4fduYAk

𝗗𝗮𝘁𝗮 𝗔𝗻𝗮𝗹𝘆𝘁𝗶𝗰𝘀: https://pdlink.in/3T2Xhdq

𝗖𝘆𝗯𝗲𝗿 𝗦𝗲𝗰𝘂𝗿𝗶𝘁𝘆 :https://pdlink.in/44xYbRC

Start learning today and build the skills top companies are hiring for.
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
𝗙𝗼𝗹𝗹𝗼𝘄 Narendra K. 𝗳𝗼𝗿 𝗿𝗲𝗮𝗹-𝘁𝗶𝗺𝗲 𝗷𝗼𝗯 𝘂𝗽𝗱𝗮𝘁𝗲𝘀 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗰𝗮𝗿𝗲𝗲𝗿 𝗼𝗽𝗽𝗼𝗿𝘁𝘂𝗻𝗶𝘁𝗶𝗲𝘀.

comment: Intern roles at companies like Stripe often test engineering judgment beyond DSA—clean code, debugging ability, understanding tradeoffs, and building reliable systems are what separate strong candidates.
